nodes.label: AI as automation tool for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me automate these tasks or give me ideas to simplify them

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner requiring verification
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous agent trusted without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I work on tasks together. I have to verify everything I do myself

nodes.label: AI reliability in document processing
nodes.grounding_span: it was unable to due to the low quality of some of the images or the handwriting

nodes.label: Personal voice and human touch in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I do not copy emails verbatim because I like to have my own personal voice

nodes.label: Human oversight of AI-generated official documents
nodes.label_negative: Blind trust in AI-generated official documents
nodes.grounding_span: people need to closely pay attention to anything they publish as official documents

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: make them quicker to do when they come up

nodes.label: Accuracy and financial integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I am handling payments and money and its critical that I understand what I'm doing

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and professional reputation
nodes.grounding_span: I like to have my own personal voice

nodes.label: Organizational credibility and quality
nodes.grounding_span: anything that reaches the public or the company as a whole needs to be vetted

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI automation success
nodes.grounding_span: I was particularly satisfied when I wrote a script in google sheets

nodes.label: Frustration with AI limitations in document reading
nodes.grounding_span: A frustrating time was when I had a bunch of scanned documents that I wanted AI to pull the name from, but it was unable

nodes.label: Critical stance toward blind AI use by others
nodes.grounding_span: I have seen others I work with seemingly use AI blindly

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of AI learning patterns
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will learn patterns from AI so that I can figure things out a little quicker

nodes.label: Verification-oriented collaborative approach
nodes.grounding_span: I work on tasks together. I have to verify everything I do myself

nodes.label: Process optimization mindset
nodes.grounding_span: I was always thinking 'how can I make this quicker/better?'
